name: Profile_R5_Transport_R4
title: Cross-version Profile for R5.Transport resource for use in FHIR R4
description: This cross-version profile allows R5 Transport resource content to be represented via FHIR R4 Basic resources.

element.short: Cross-version Profile for R5.Transport resource for use in FHIR R4
element.definition: This cross-version profile allows R5 Transport resource content to be represented via FHIR R4 Basic resources.

element.comment:
Element `Transport.instantiatesCanonical` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `Transport` is not mapped.
Element `Transport.instantiatesCanonical` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

Element `Transport.instantiatesUri` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `Transport` is not mapped.
Element `Transport.instantiatesUri` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: Request fulfilled by this transport (new)
element.comment:
Element `Transport.basedOn` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `Transport` is not mapped.
Element `Transport.basedOn` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

Element `Transport.groupIdentifier` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `Transport` is not mapped.
Element `Transport.groupIdentifier` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

Element `Transport.partOf` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `Transport` is not mapped.
Element `Transport.partOf` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
Not to be used to link an event to an Encounter - use Event.context for that.[The allowed reference resources may be adjusted as appropriate for the event resource].

Element `Transport.statusReason` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `Transport` is not mapped.
Element `Transport.statusReason` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
This applies to the current status.  Look at the history of the transport to see reasons for past statuses.

element.short: R5: unknown | proposal | plan | order | original-order | reflex-order | filler-order | instance-order | option (new)
element.comment:
Element `Transport.intent` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `Transport` is not mapped.
Element `Transport.intent` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
This element is immutable.  Proposed transports, planned transports, etc. must be distinct instances.

In most cases, Transports will have an intent of "order".

Element `Transport.priority` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `Transport` is not mapped.
Element `Transport.priority` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

Element `Transport.code` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `Transport` is not mapped.
Element `Transport.code` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
The title (eg "My Transports", "Outstanding Transports for Patient X") should go into the code.

Element `Transport.description` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `Transport` is not mapped.
Element `Transport.description` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: What transport is acting on (new)
element.comment:
Element `Transport.focus` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `Transport` is not mapped.
Element `Transport.focus` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
If multiple resources need to be manipulated, use sub-transports.  (This ensures that status can be tracked independently for each referenced resource.).

Element `Transport.for` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `Transport` is not mapped.
Element `Transport.for` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: Healthcare event during which this transport originated (new)

Element `Transport.lastModified` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `Transport` is not mapped.

element.short: R5: Who is asking for transport to be done (new)
element.comment:

Element `Transport.requester` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

Element `Transport.performerType` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `Transport` is not mapped.
Element `Transport.performerType` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

Element `Transport.owner` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `Transport` is not mapped.
Element `Transport.owner` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
Transports may be created with an owner not yet identified.

Element `Transport.location` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `Transport` is not mapped.
Element `Transport.location` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: Comments made about the transport (new)
element.comment:
Element `Transport.note` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `Transport` is not mapped.
Element `Transport.note` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: Key events in history of the Transport (new)
element.comment:
Element `Transport.relevantHistory` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `Transport` is not mapped.
Element `Transport.relevantHistory` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
This element does not point to the Provenance associated with the *current* version of the resource - as it would be created after this version existed.  The Provenance for the current version can be retrieved with a _revinclude.

Element `Transport.restriction` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `Transport` is not mapped.
Element `Transport.restriction` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: Information used to perform transport (new)
element.comment:
Element `Transport.input` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `Transport` is not mapped.
Element `Transport.input` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: Information produced as part of transport (new)
element.comment:
Element `Transport.output` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `Transport` is not mapped.
Element `Transport.output` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

Element `Transport.requestedLocation` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `Transport` is not mapped.
Element `Transport.requestedLocation` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

Element `Transport.currentLocation` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `Transport` is not mapped.
Element `Transport.currentLocation` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

Element `Transport.reason` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `Transport` is not mapped.
Element `Transport.reason` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
Transports might be justified based on an Observation, a Condition, a past or planned procedure, etc. This should only be included if there is no focus or if it differs from the reason indicated on the focus.    Use the CodeableConcept text element in `Transport.reasonCode` if the data is free (uncoded) text.

Element `Transport.history` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `Transport` is not mapped.
Element `Transport.history` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: in-progress | completed | abandoned | cancelled | planned | entered-in-error (new)
element.comment:
